title: 🤑 How to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online in 2026 📈: A Step-by-Step Guide 🏦
metaTitle: PM Mudra Loan Online Application 2026 | Mudra Loan Eligibility and Interest Rate
metaDescription: Learn how to apply for PM Mudra loan online in 2026. Check eligibility, interest rate, and required documents. Get funded 🤑 and grow your business 📈
intro: Are you a small business owner or entrepreneur looking for funds to grow your business? 🤔 The PM Mudra loan is a great option for you! 🤑 Introduced by the Government of India, the Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY) aims to provide funding to non-corporate, non-farm sector income-generating activities of micro and small enterprises. In this article, we will guide you through the process of applying for a PM Mudra loan online in 2026. 📈

sections.heading: 🏦 Introduction to PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: The PM Mudra loan is a type of business loan that provides funding to small and micro enterprises. The loan is categorized into three types: Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun. 🤑 The loan amount ranges from ₹50,000 to ₹10 lakhs. The interest rate varies from 8.5% to 12.5% per annum, depending on the lender and loan amount. 📈

sections.heading: 📝 Eligibility Criteria and Required Documents
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra loan, you must meet the following eligibility criteria: 🤔 you must be a small business owner or entrepreneur, your business must be a non-farm sector income-generating activity, and you must have a good credit score. 📈 The required documents include: identity proof, address proof, business registration documents, and income tax returns. ✅

sections.heading: 📊 Step-by-Step Online Application Process
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra loan online, follow these steps: 📈 visit the official website of the lender or the PM Mudra portal, fill out the online application form, upload the required documents, and submit the application. 📊 You will receive a confirmation message and a reference number. 📝 The lender will verify your application and documents, and if approved, the loan amount will be disbursed to your account. 🤑

sections.heading: 📈 Interest Rate and Repayment Terms
sections.content: The interest rate for PM Mudra loans varies from 8.5% to 12.5% per annum, depending on the lender and loan amount. 📈 The repayment term ranges from 5 to 7 years. 📆 You can repay the loan in monthly installments. 📊 The lender may also offer a moratorium period of up to 6 months. 📝

faqs.q: What is the maximum loan amount that can be borrowed under the PM Mudra loan scheme? 🤑
faqs.a: The maximum loan amount that can be borrowed under the PM Mudra loan scheme is ₹10 lakhs. 📈

faqs.q: What is the interest rate for PM Mudra loans? 📈
faqs.a: The interest rate for PM Mudra loans varies from 8.5% to 12.5% per annum, depending on the lender and loan amount. 📊

faqs.q: What are the required documents for applying for a PM Mudra loan? 📝
faqs.a: The required documents for applying for a PM Mudra loan include identity proof, address proof, business registration documents, and income tax returns. ✅
